taskName: Chunk upload backend and resumable session core
goal: Implement the backend core for allowlisted file upload, resumable chunk sessions, 4GB init validation, same-name auto-renaming on complete, and persistent upload state tracking.
nonGoals: Do not build the full admin page.
Do not add unsupported file types beyond the approved whitelist.

acceptanceChecks.text: When a file larger than 4GB is initialized for upload, the backend should reject it with the fixed size-limit error.
When an upload is interrupted and resumed, the backend should report uploadedChunkIndexes and missingChunkIndexes accurately enough for the client to continue.
When a newly completed file conflicts with an existing display name, the backend should preserve the old file and finalize the new file with an auto-renamed safe name.

publishPolicy.commitMessage: FE-T003: FileEasy chunk upload backend and resumable core
publishPolicy.prTitle: FE-T003: FileEasy chunk upload backend and resumable core

handoffQuestions: List only unresolved backend edge cases that require design clarification.
